##  👻 Overview

## 👾 Data

### 👈 Input
- source_id
- source_type (USPTO / SEC / PubMed)
- raw_text
- source_url
- date
- company_seed

### 👉 Output
- raw_mention
- normalized_name
- canonical_name
- entity_type
- merge_confidence
- merge_decision
- evidence_note
